content.full_text:
March 9, 2001

Kinnari P. Shah
Stradling Yocca Carlson & Rauth
44 Montgomery Street, Suite 4200
San Francisco, CA 94104

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-016

Dear Ms. Shah:

This letter is to memorialize the withdrawal of your January 17, 2001, request for written advice to the Fair Political Practices Commission, as confirmed by your March 7, 2001, telephone conversation with Lawrence T. Woodlock.

Please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660 should you have any additional questions or comments.

Very truly yours,

Joan Giannetta
Secretary, Legal Division
